attempts.insight: MvPolynomial pderiv coefficient formula coeff (u - single i 1) (pderiv i f) = coeff u f * (u i : k) is a substantive new lemma not in Mathlib; closed in ~40 LOC via MvPolynomial.as_sum + pderiv_monomial + Finset.sum_eq_single + finsupp-subtraction case-bashing. KaehlerDifferential.mvPolynomialBasis_repr_apply bridges D f = 0 to ∀ i, pderiv i f = 0 for the free polynomial algebra. KaehlerDifferential.map_D provides functoriality D_B (π x) = (map ...)(D_A x). KaehlerDifferential.ker_map_of_surjective gives explicit kernel description: ker (map k k P.Ring B) = (P.Ring-submodule generated by {D_A r : r ∈ I}) + I · Ω[P.Ring⁄k].

attempts.insight: Differential.ContainConstants only handles single-derivation kernel, not joint kernel. Subsingleton (Ω[B⁄k]) only holds in relative dimension 0. Algebra.FormallyUnramified implies Ω = 0; B is FormallySmooth but not FormallyUnramified (positive relative dimension). No direct ker D = C.range Mathlib lemma exists for general polynomial rings.
